response:
| | **Pros** | **Cons** |
|---|---|---|
| **1** | **Flexibility** – Employees can set their own schedules and work from any location | **Isolation** – Lack of in-person interaction can lead to loneliness and disconnection |
| **2** | **No Commute** – Saves time and money while reducing stress and carbon footprint | **Distractions at Home** – Household responsibilities and interruptions can reduce productivity |
| **3** | **Better Work-Life Balance** – More time for personal activities and family | **Communication Challenges** – Collaboration and team coordination can be harder without face-to-face contact |
